microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized automation system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability—delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce planning cycle time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, scaling team leverage through intelligent automation.
microsoft_2023: Championed **adoption of AI-driven automation workflows**, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical capability gaps, directly leading to prioritization of intent-based YAML generation features.
Improved data retrieval and field readiness by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83%.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering teams.

Defined product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches—conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and allocate resources to high-impact workstreams by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking toil metrics across 140+ teams with real-time visibility.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process for a robotics software platform.
Drove implementation of **automated CI/CD pipelines** across robotics software systems, accelerating the deployment cycle by 25% and improving release reliability for production automation workflows.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process that improved field readiness and conversion.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and translating customer insights into actionable positioning.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model improvements that directly informed leadership investment decisions.
